segments.text: Even with that kind of player precision
segments.original_text: ああいったところでも本当にプレイヤーの精度でもって

segments.text: They're looking to perfect their matchups against Steve, Alex, and Raricus
segments.original_text: 対スティーブ、対アレックス、ラリックスを完成させようという構えです

full_text: Even with that kind of player precision They're looking to perfect their matchups against Steve, Alex, and Raricus And with that Bair!
